Package de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.op

Interface ParsableVariable

All Superinterfaces:
EqualsModProofIrrelevancy, Named, Operator, SortedOperator, SVSubstitute
All Known Subinterfaces:
QuantifiableVariable, SchemaVariable, UpdateableOperator
All Known Implementing Classes:
AbstractSV, FormulaSV, LocationVariable, LogicVariable, Metavariable, ModalOperatorSV, ProgramConstant, ProgramSV, ProgramVariable, SkolemTermSV, TermLabelSV, TermSV, UpdateSV, VariableSV
public interface ParsableVariable extends SortedOperator
This interface represents the variables that can be recognized by one of the parsers.
